steps.title: Find the slope from the two points
Eliminate the answer choices
steps.content:
Test each at $x=2$ and $x=6$:
  • A) $f(x)=-2x+17$: $f(2)=13$, not $3$. Fails.
  • B) $f(x)=-2x+15$: $f(2)=11$, not $3$. Fails.
  • C) $f(x)=\tfrac{1}{2}x+2$: $f(2)=3$ and $f(6)=5$. Both check.
  • D) $f(x)=\tfrac{1}{2}x+14$: $f(2)=15$, not $3$. Fails.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
